sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n26542" key="diektulo/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διεκ-τῠλόω</orth>, <sense id="n26542.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">remove a callus,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:1:46" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.46</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
